meta.title: One of the best ways to improve the apps you build is to share them early: Andrew Ng
meta.description:
One of the best ways to improve the apps you build is to share them early.

In the beginner-friendly "Build with Andrew" course, Andrew Ng encourages showing your apps to friends, family, or colleagues to get feedback and make it better. You’ll build something real, try it out, and keep improving it step by step.

Start today! https://bit.ly/4pxPyi7
